review:
Have always passed by this place but glad I finally  came in. They pretty much have everything here, coffee, drinks, lunch, brunch, music. Staff was very friendly, and very helpful about what to order. Place is cool and clean, with clean bathrooms...rare in Ybor. 

Drinks were spot on, and presented well. Even the coffee drink with dessert was just right. Great prices too if you're here for just some drinks. Bar area seating, indoor seating, and an outdoor back patio. 

This queso is the best I've had. Even compared to the Mexican restaurants I've been too. Tacos were assembled and put together just right, seasoned and tasting just right. Pork sandwich assembled and presented well. Plate cleaned. To finish it all off, strawberry shortcake. Light, airy, not too sweet. 

Hope to be back soon. I really want to even pick up some queso to bring home.
